# Start prototyping with Firebase Studio

<div class="video-container">
  <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/hB1BdhINRNE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Description

Did you know you can build an app with Firebase Studio? Rody, a Developer Relations Engineer for Firebase Studio shares how to build and deploy an app using the prototype feature. 

Firebase Studio → https://studio.firebase.google.com 

 #Firebase  #VibeCoding #AI

Speaker: Rody Davis
Products Mentioned:,  Firebase
